summary: All 7 changes ready with no external blockers. Key gaps: React SDK uses semantic names not catalog slugs; Flutter SSE client has no reconnect loop; no .github/workflows or gateway/kiln Dockerfiles; HTMX covers 7 of 55 slugs (split htmx.rs before adding 48 more); exportDesignSyncTokens and ZIP import are small new additions. Optimal order: G3+G5+G6 first (small), then G1+G2 in parallel, then G4 parallelised by category, G7 last.
